raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "reporting or declaring a past action of making a humble request to a higher power",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a being referred to as 'Him' exists and has the capacity to remove personal shortcomings",
    "the speaker(s) possess shortcomings that require external removal",
    "the request was made in a humble manner",
    "the action involves or benefits a collective group ('our')"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a concise declarative report of a completed action with clear subject, verb, and object",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement occurs in a context of personal testimony, spiritual practice, or self-improvement where shared belief in a higher power is accepted and the focus is on acknowledging limitations",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is presented as an objective factual event rather than a subjective or faith-based report, or is used to imply guaranteed efficacy without supporting belief systems"
}
